---
name: Tool support request
about: Request support for a new AI coding assistant
title: '[TOOL] Add support for...'
labels: enhancement, tool-request
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Information

**Tool name**: 工具名称

**Tool website**: 工具官网

**GitHub repository**: GitHub 仓库地址

**Installation methods supported**:
- [ ] npm
- [ ] Homebrew (macOS/Linux)
- [ ] pipx
- [ ] uv
- [ ] Chocolatey (Windows)
- [ ] Scoop (Windows)
- [ ] Standalone installer

## Version Detection

**How does the tool report its version?**
- Command: `tool --version` 或 `tool -v`
- Example output: 粘贴版本输出示例

**Where is the latest version published?**
- [ ] npm registry
- [ ] GitHub releases
- [ ] PyPI
- [ ] Homebrew formula
- [ ] Other: specify

## Configuration Files

**Does the tool have configuration files that should be backed up?**
- [ ] Yes (specify paths below)
- [ ] No

If yes, list configuration file paths:
- macOS/Linux: e.g., `~/.config/toolname`
- Windows: e.g., `%USERPROFILE%\.config\toolname`

## Additional Notes

添加任何其他信息，如：
- 特殊的安装说明
- 已知问题
- 相关链接

## Checklist

- [ ] 我已确认此工具尚未被支持
- [ ] 我已验证工具的安装方法
- [ ] 我已找到工具的版本检测方法
